name: Christmas Ginger Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, ginger, cloves, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
2. In another large bowl, beat the shortening, molasses, brown sugar, water, egg, and vanilla until well blended.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir until a soft dough forms.
4. Divide the dough into four equal parts. Roll each part into a 1-inch thick round on a lightly floured surface.
5. Wrap each round in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 3 hours or up to 1 week.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Roll out the dough to 1/8-inch thickness on a lightly floured surface.
8. Cut with gingerbread cutters and place on ungreased baking sheets.
9. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until edges are golden brown.
10. Allow cookies to cool slightly on the baking sheet, then transfer to wire racks to cool completely.
11. Decorate with Royal Icing (see separate recipe).
